question: Scenario: A retail organization is planning a new initiative. Scenario: A team is planning work in the area of dataverse. Which approach best meets the requirement?
options: A. configure a Dataverse data model and security
B. use tables, relationships, columns, and appropriate privileges
C. store all relational data in one text field
D. grant every user full access
explanation: The primary objective is to configure a Dataverse data model and security. Use tables, relationships, columns, and appropriate privileges is an important complementary practice.

question: Scenario: A retail organization is planning a new initiative. Which practice best supports successful work in dataverse?
options: A. store all relational data in one text field
B. use tables, relationships, columns, and appropriate privileges
C. grant every user full access
D. use an unrelated feature without validating the business requirement
explanation: Use tables, relationships, columns, and appropriate privileges supports the primary objective to configure a Dataverse data model and security.

options: A. configure a Dataverse data model and security

D. grant every user full access
explanation: The correct actions are to configure a Dataverse data model and security and to use tables, relationships, columns, and appropriate privileges. The other choices undermine the requirement.
